mentions.note: Cancer vaccination promise long-awaited; stock up 54% YTD; Cramer wants to wait and see how certain clinical data is before buying despite good intentions.
Up 50% on 2026 revenue growth return and cancer vaccine potential; but remains deeply unprofitable with years of losses ahead; other biotech like Regeneron preferred.
Personal cancer vaccines promised for seven years; hope they happen but track record on delivery is mixed.
Up 72% Q1 (6th best S&P); pandemic cleanup after wilderness years; new flu vaccine FDA review, settled lawsuits, RFK Jr.'s vaccine-skeptic departure huge catalysts; momentum building.

146% YTD rally (#12 S&P 500 performer) justified by cancer vaccine pipeline advancement, flu vaccine FDA approval path (August 5), European combo flu/COVID approval, and profitability roadmap to 2028 cash break-even.
